sum_insured_options.source_quote: Sum Insured options per Policy Schedule (MediCare: 3L/5L/7.5L/10L/15L/20L/25L)

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: 30-day waiting period for illness (standard IRDAI Excl03)

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: i. Pre-existing Diseases Waiting Period (Code- Excl 01) a. Expenses related to the treatment of a pre-existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Specified Disease/Procedure Waiting Period (Code- Excl 02): ... excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Maternity not a base benefit of MediCare (base variant); upgrade to MediCare Premier (TATHLIP21257) for maternity inclusion

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Pre-Hospitalization expenses ... incurred upto 60 days before the date of admission

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Post-Hospitalization expenses ... incurred upto 90 days after discharge from the hospital.

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: Day Care Procedures ... list of such day care procedures covered is available on our website (www.tataaig.com)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Medical Practitioner referenced (AYUSH treatment covered)

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Maternity not a base benefit of MediCare (excluded as per standard IRDAI Excl18; MediCare Premier variant includes maternity)

newborn_coverage.source_quote: Maternity excluded; newborn cover linked to maternity

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: Cumulative Bonus available (rate per claim-free year per Policy Schedule; max 100% of Sum Insured)

restoration_benefit.value: Restore Benefit: automatic restoration of Basic Sum Insured upon exhaustion, once per policy period
restoration_benefit.source_quote: B7. Restore benefits We will automatically restore the Basic Sum Insured upon exhaustion of the Sum Insured and accrued Cumulative Bonus

room_rent_capping.value: Per Policy Schedule (Single Private Room category typical)
